name: Team Hick
subject: Just $4
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
We're asking you to pitch in just $4 today. Why? Democrats only need to flip _four_ seats to take back the Senate majority this year. Polls show Democrats surging into the lead in _four_ battleground states -- Arizona, Maine, North Carolina, and yep you guessed it, Colorado. That's the ballgame, folks. John's opponent and Trump ally, Cory Gardner, is seeing his approval ratings plummet while our campaign is on the rise -- proving that Colorado is the Democrats' best chance to flip a seat in November. But don't be fooled, we're facing mountains of outside spending and right-wing attacks -- including $5.5 million from McConnell's super PAC this week. We can win this race, but only if we have the resources to fight back: **Will you pitch in just $4 ($1 for each seat we need to flip!) today before our FEC fundraising deadline to help us fight back against GOP attacks? name: Booker HQ
subject: Looking to hear from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Please share your story if you have a moment. |
#
Friend, As the coronavirus continues to impact our country, we wanted to take a moment to create a space for the team to share experiences, emotions, and just generally what's on your mind. During these difficult times, the best healing tool we have is each other. It's okay to be scared or upset about all that's going and how much further we have to go before we're on the other side of this. We've been encouraged knowing that every single day during this crisis, Cory has been hard at work in the Senate -- fighting to get hospitals and health care workers the resources they need, advocating for increased unemployment benefits for those who have lost jobs, standing up for small businesses who need help right now, and so much more. **And he wants to hear directly from you, friend, about how this crisis is affecting you and your family.** [**If you feel comfortable doing so, will you share your personal story here? We won 't share your answers publicly, but these responses will mean so much to Cory as he continues his work in the Senate to provide relief to those affected by the coronavirus.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f9e/5fca0d19/7a441925/291d1b5a/2602809284/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/share-your-story-march-20?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+If+you+feel+comfortable+doing+so+will+yo&utm_campaign=em200327&source=em200327") | [SHARE YOUR STORY](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f9e/5fca0d19/7a441925/291d1b59/2602809284/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/share-your-story-march-20?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+SHARE+YOUR+STORY&utm_campaign=em200327&source=em200327")
---
Whether it's experiencing financial hardship or knowing someone who is battling the virus or even sharing ways you're keeping busy while indoors, we're all in this together. Just because we're keeping physical distance does not mean we're going through this alone, and you never know who will benefit from hearing that others are facing the same issues.
Please make sure to take care of yourself and your loved ones during this emergency.
Booker HQ

**Here are important resources to refer to during this public health emergency:
[www.cdc.gov/coronavirus](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f9e/5fca0d19/7a441925/291d1b58/2602809284/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+wwwcdcgovcoronavirus&utm_campaign=em200327&source=em200327")
[www.covid19.nj.gov](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f9e/5fca0d19/7a441925/291d1ba7/2602809284/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.covid19.nj.gov?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=4+-+wwwcovid19njgov&utm_campaign=em200327&source=em200327")
[www.jobs.covid19.nj.gov](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f9e/5fca0d19/7a441925/291d1ba6/2602809284/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.jobs.covid19.nj.gov?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=5+-+wwwjobscovid19njgov&utm_campaign=em200327&source=em200327")**

We know this is a difficult time for many folks.
If you'd like to receive fewer emails during this public health crisis, [**please click here**. ](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f9e/5fca0d19/7a441925/291d1ba5/2602809284/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=6+-+please+click+here+&utm_campaign=em200327&source=em200327")

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: lessons on China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
For the sake of our economy and more importantly our health and security, it’s time we brought that home and I want to get to Washington to make sure _Peter - We know that the coronavirus outbreak has put many American families in an unexpected financial situation. Please only contribute if you can and if you would like to stop receiving fundraising emails for the time being,**[please follow this link>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=309e16ac91934ab783a596ab6f491b0e&_e=zfLnNlVvYJbA-QEu4PNo9FhtU7_E6ZY9SJUmEKJ6aPzBx0G4xzZMH0QeHeBBY8_E_VKcWcVFZiibr5-4ibQXYTbZ73IyDS_VBGGeTXeMsBrrUjRS2m9yGVyfhQ7HOGpkiIlsPFsTPq1B5GzI3GtSC9-QoaufshuFsGXzW5DenDqegMQHwP5ZcRxZohg2Uu18_7zxRzsrTUz8uDUy7DsbUH7RUdCt5R5Q8uCzMHEjv7hftBdSBKqxyRfz0-43KWDYHFhPxolzQ7rYU1Dj-9zOiREpYFRdFNNiV6dGE8SwbxFOSrjnNZO1ZFQsbj86ssDRMowDH9aH1qwvVtokxwxTkbK_IV8K-PCIR2J750hnKlE_s18WbzBUkzu0PaZnV9XTX2KQ3v5CI_pjobSUf_WG82r7IPXJNuPWbWLzDYBRm1EiJin0O17TJruAYkfK4ECjWGgSawjz67ihRJ53RM5gBczVm0ad8a0-BaeYtQfA98k%3D)**_ [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=309e16ac91934ab783a596ab6f491b0e&_e=zfLnNlVvYJbA-QEu4PNo9FhtU7_E6ZY9SJUmEKJ6aPzBx0G4xzZMH0QeHeBBY8_EjjlvpGw6ODzy64Z-v6AgkrSMdhEkcsa9eSanLpLa3bs6qq6jsXUlePbpbkw2InntJu3Inu0gt5gqvn0s6JdMsrKIajsJpgwE-ZJ-OMWdRHz8pprIeiE9GQDY8Iupbcu7ARX6pyfmlJjLTl0_HHCEtHoxJg9mGz4xfqJEzMvFxCDW8iVmbYMeXCciRn137g-GVBZXuqK2rPRn83P7QwtyZSe1K0xC9cYSAL8rTQHrCdpJbaGRpz3QHQtUDwyVEqW7ENiYsrdGU29zCrkkn2IRiJXbLOzszBClOP74fbagkuT8cEYyJbztrOTMzxXkr4jhwRxQyyaetUMgpJEOFedGLZ1r6i9zga9g-LHwkzd8DNj-4KD28WPmruKwAAC6l7DaO3RUWtBcw3fdRBi95dxrAamJwB2o2vKTs9K_ZTpG7k8%3D) Peter, America has learned a lot of lessons from the Coronavirus crisis, but one of the most glaring holes it brought to light is America’s over-reliance on China for producing prescription drugs.
For the sake of our economy and more importantly our health and security, it’s time we brought that home and I want to get to Washington to make sure it happens.
**[JOIN CLAUDIA: END AMERICAN DEPENDENCE ON CHINA>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=309e16ac91934ab783a596ab6f491b0e&_e=zfLnNlVvYJbA-QEu4PNo9FhtU7_E6ZY9SJUmEKJ6aPzBx0G4xzZMH0QeHeBBY8_EjjlvpGw6ODzy64Z-v6AgkrSMdhEkcsa9eSanLpLa3bs6qq6jsXUlePbpbkw2InntJu3Inu0gt5gqvn0s6JdMsrKIajsJpgwE-ZJ-OMWdRHz8pprIeiE9GQDY8Iupbcu7ARX6pyfmlJjLTl0_HHCEtHoxJg9mGz4xfqJEzMvFxCDW8iVmbYMeXCciRn137g-GVBZXuqK2rPRn83P7QwtyZUOkRH9lJ_0P9k5cDuzczwPrLN6WkHpNrGMzqtksnRVQ2I2dzybRlPrj1pN7t6-1u3dv8EZg2QnTFPA1fxEUS6vnXB8_ekNQcj45JH41I3xxIs5SjUSyez821m_UkQIeAjZaR38FKqfO0OQRtk_dVl78PPS_432CnOxvBhGHTTRNgwQqZUbUA12NfQcXznm7THX4ByUYDvRkMXR8Sjg5wMI%3D)** Peter, we can no longer deny it: China is a real and present danger to America and Americans.

For years, they've engaged in direct economic warfare. China steals $600 billion a year in ideas and designs that American minds develop and provide to the market – from movies and fashion to computer systems and chemical compounds like pharmaceuticals.

_**But there’s a more immediate threat to America – and it’s a matter of life and death.**_

**China makes 90% of all antibiotics, vitamin C, ibuprofen, and over 70% of acetaminophen (Tylenol) available in the U.S. They also make many of the ingredients and do so in unsafe and unmonitored labs and factories.**

This whole epidemic has proven the Chinese cannot be trusted and they should no longer be relied on – especially for vital medical treatments and supplies. **It’s not just risky for patients, it’s a threat to national security for China to be able to hold us hostage or worse, poison us.**

**We MUST end this dangerous dependence on China, bring those jobs home, and make our medicine here in the United States of America. If you agree, please sign my petition today.**
[ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=309e16ac91934ab783a596ab6f491b0e&_e=zfLnNlVvYJbA-QEu4PNo9FhtU7_E6ZY9SJUmEKJ6aPzBx0G4xzZMH0QeHeBBY8_EjjlvpGw6ODzy64Z-v6AgkrSMdhEkcsa9eSanLpLa3bs6qq6jsXUlePbpbkw2InntJu3Inu0gt5gqvn0s6JdMsrKIajsJpgwE-ZJ-OMWdRHz8pprIeiE9GQDY8Iupbcu7ARX6pyfmlJjLTl0_HHCEtHoxJg9mGz4xfqJEzMvFxCDW8iVmbYMeXCciRn137g-GVBZXuqK2rPRn83P7QwtyZZ7DpL8F1COWmKM5fGe5pzsDMWGL4hdAULGZSCRgq6VoaYEl0L0G2vuVGvTSLWJKxFGcXoTXR49g5-iRWbBVczVLw753ETv5xjiAui0pkeoI7-X4eKgFT-12lk3rJTVw4G3S-Svp6S_7EgDJ6wveJX7aiBgZXfIiPpNru6Y245E27JiVW1jzbZy44IevyNhSXQsXV90KZKmqlaXcAyAtTw0%3D) Breaking China’s grip on our country is essential for our economic survival, military strength, and America’s very health.
We cannot afford to ignore this issue any longer.
Join me to stand up today:

[**https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/china-1108506**

](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=309e16ac91934ab783a596ab6f491b0e&_e=zfLnNlVvYJbA-QEu4PNo9FhtU7_E6ZY9SJUmEKJ6aPzBx0G4xzZMH0QeHeBBY8_EjjlvpGw6ODzy64Z-v6AgkrSMdhEkcsa9eSanLpLa3bs6qq6jsXUlePbpbkw2InntJu3Inu0gt5gqvn0s6JdMsrKIajsJpgwE-ZJ-OMWdRHz8pprIeiE9GQDY8Iupbcu7ARX6pyfmlJjLTl0_HHCEtHoxJg9mGz4xfqJEzMvFxCDW8iVmbYMeXCciRn137g-GVBZXuqK2rPRn83P7QwtyZSmtyZJVdktt0oNmKW1rjpd6axXTsc3LQReQLzuPBhnlKbfe859rNGCL58pdtBEXydKA4qVHmkkm06qQ1q61UuGZBgRdF-epfuRr526HXdBG8G3RtFJ5Y_YZDq-sod70PLrMQNd61kLB0k_hiePEiO6EA68hNRkH-LHr0MyW3_uKf8698af0chs3kWRLmWbO55WRE02-msAjmdG1Cu1xvA8%3D) Claudia Tenney |

Please only contribute if you can and if you would like to stop receiving fundraising emails for the time being, Peter, America has learned a lot of lessons from the Coronavirus crisis, but one of the most glaring holes it brought to light is America’s over-reliance on China for producing prescription drugs. For the sake of our economy and more importantly our health and security, it’s time we brought that home and I want to get to Washington to make sure it happens. Peter, we can no longer deny it: China is a real and present danger to America and Americans. For years, they've engaged in direct economic warfare. China steals $600 billion a year in ideas and designs that American minds develop and provide to the market – from movies and fashion to computer systems and chemical compounds like pharmaceuticals. But there’s a more immediate threat to America – and it’s a matter of life and death. China makes 90% of all antibiotics, vitamin C, ibuprofen, and over 70% of acetaminophen (Tylenol) available in the U.S. They also make many of the ingredients and do so in unsafe and unmonitored labs and factories. This whole epidemic has proven the Chinese cannot be trusted and they should no longer be relied on – especially for vital medical treatments and supplies. It’s not just risky for patients, it’s a threat to national security for China to be able to hold us hostage or worse, poison us. We MUST end this dangerous dependence on China, bring those jobs home, and make our medicine here in the United States of America. If you agree, please sign my petition today. Breaking China’s grip on our country is essential for our economic survival, military strength, and America’s very health. We cannot afford to ignore this issue any longer. Join me to stand up today: Claudia Tenney | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | By law the maximum amount an individual may contribute is $2,800 for the primary and $2,800 for the general election. Federal law requires us to obtain and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 per election cycle. By clicking “Donate Now" I certify that the following statements are true and accurate: I am at least 18 years old, this contribution is made from my personal credit or debit card with my own personal funds and is not made from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organization, national bank, or entity or person that is a federal contractor, and I will not be reimbursed for this contribution by another person. I am a U.S. citizen or a lawfully admitted permanent resident, and I am not a foreign national or a federal contractor. Contributions are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Funds received are subject to federal limits and source prohibitions. Contributions by corporations, national banks, foreign nationals (non-green card holders), labor unions, federal government contractors, and minors under the age of 18 are prohibited. © 2017 By subscribing with your mobile number you are agreeing to receive periodic text messages from Claudia Tenney for Congress. name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: I just drove 8 hours to DC and 8 hours back home.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639008d/55b66746/23f75ed0/80e1850/1554610736/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | We got word late last night that a Republican from Kentucky was trying to scuttle passage of the emergency funding bill. So I got in my car at 4 o'clock this morning to drive to D.C. for the vote. We voted to pass a $2 trillion relief package, despite that one member's efforts. Then I got back in my car and drove 8 hours back. **Our families. Our state. Our country needed this.** While it's not the exact bill I would have written, it's a start. We need more robust direct cash assistance: $4,000 for every American making under $100,000 a year - $2,000 for their kids; $2,000 for every American making over $100,000 a year - $1,000 for their kids. And yes, this includes everyone on social security and other assistance. I could have done without the huge bailouts and giveaways to corporations that Republicans forced into this bill. But know that I will continue the fight to ensure resources go directly to our communities. Right into people's hands. Not getting lost on corporations. And most importantly: our frontlines desperately need more resources. Ventilators. Equipment. They need more help. Period. I promise I will continue to do everything I can to fight to get the resources and assistance we need. Keep safe. Take care of your loved ones. Talk soon. Joe [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639008d/55b66746/23f75ed0/80e1851/1554610736/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://kennedyforma.com/mobile-alert/") **P.S. Follow this link to sign up for our text alert program to receive important updates and when I'm going live: [https://kennedyforma.com/mobile-alert/](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639008d/55b66746/23f75ed0/80e1851/1554610736/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://kennedyforma.com/mobile-alert/")** |
---|---|---

PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

name: Nolan Varee
subject: We're facing a major FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10

We’re still going to do everything we can between now and November to send Eugene to Congress, but we need you on our side, team.

name: Kathleen Sebelius
subject: Friend, Michelle needs your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
These are not ordinary times and this isn’t an ordinary request. As we face a very serious health and economic crisis in the US, the need for competent, caring and hard-working individuals to serve in our government is more important than ever.

Dear friends,

These are not ordinary times and this isn’t an ordinary request. As we face a very serious health and economic crisis in the US, the need for competent, caring and hard-working individuals to serve in our government is more important than ever. I am very proud of the work that our Governor, Laura Kelly, is doing to keep Kansans safe, secure, and informed. And I appreciate Sharice Davids more than ever, as she works with her colleagues in the House to act quickly on behalf of American families.

But we need a different representative in the 2nd District! And we have a great candidate in Mayor Michelle De La Isla who is running for Congress. As complicated as our lives have become trying to follow health guidance and keep our families and ourselves safe, think of how complicated it is to try and run for office in this unprecedented time. Gatherings have been cancelled, and instead of meeting lots of constituents, candidates are told to stay home. The November election will still happen, but time is being lost to conduct an effective campaign.

Michelle declared for Congress in January and knew that her first quarter of fundraising, which ends on March 31st, is her most important. She needs to raise $300,000 this quarter to run her campaign's planned strategy to reach voters, and to show Democrats across the county that she can win this battleground district. She has been working hard, calling donors and connecting with voters across the district. She's already raised over $250,000 so far -- but Michelle was counting on a number of events and donors in the next few weeks to help with this final push.

So, I am calling on you to help her reach this goal. If you haven’t given, please give now! If you have made a donation and thought you might do more later in the campaign, now is the time! We desperately need new leaders for Kansas -- and for the country. In times of crisis, we need to focus on supporting each other in the short term, and fixing problems for the future.

**[If you can, please donate $5 or more before Michelle's end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday at midnight. Every dollar gets her one step closer to this important goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16613104/176627731/-1341710104?gpsid=22_122_12248&refcode=em20_200328_sebeli_fnd_gq_nopn__KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200328_sebeli_fnd_gq_nopn__KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWZhZGI2My0xNzcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FeX68lwDf9wuClOyaQqonquqrCZvqiJEnVD0q6TnlVA=)**

Stay well and take care of yourself, your family and your neighbors.
With gratitude,

Kathleen Sebelius
****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16613106/176627733/-1341710104?gpsid=22_122_12248&refcode=em20_200328_sebeli_fnd_gq_nopn__KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200328_sebeli_fnd_gq_nopn__KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWZhZGI2My0xNzcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FeX68lwDf9wuClOyaQqonquqrCZvqiJEnVD0q6TnlVA=)****
---

name: David Hill
subject: President Biden?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | [](http://links
body:
These are trying times for our entire country. Everyone is facing hardship in different ways as a result of this global pandemic. Peter, These are trying times for our entire country. Everyone is facing hardship in different ways as a result of this global pandemic. But Americans have been tested before, and we have never turned away from a challenge. This is no exception. We will endure. Our economy will bounce back, and our lives will return to normal. | | Peter,

In 2018, we saw so many incredible women stand up and say that enough was enough -- it's time to run for office and ensure a better future for all Americans. In November, we're going to see a new cohort of women senators take office with your help.

**[With Women's History Month coming to a close, will you support the badass, history-making women running for Senate this year?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c4/7f51f7bc/4cc42e00/4ef1dde2/1020298279/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-womenshistorymonth?refcode=email_20200328.1nd__1129__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Senator Tina Smith (MN), Senator Jeanne Shaheen (NH), Barbara Bollier (KS), Theresa Greenfield (IA), Sara Gideon (ME), and I are in tight races that will determine the future of the Senate.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: ICYMI: Primary Day is June 2
body:
There's been a lot of news this week. As key members of our Republican team here in Indiana, we want to make sure you know about the latest election.. |
---
| |
---
| **ICYMI: Primary Day is June 2**
---
| Hoosier Republican,

There has been a lot of news this week. As key members of our Republican team here in Indiana, we want to make sure you know about the latest election updates -- **including that the 2020 primary election has been moved from****May 5 to June 2**!

In addition to the new June 2 primary date, ANY registered voter can also cast their vote via a mail-in absentee ballot.

Here are a few dates you'll want to mark on your calendar:
* **Monday, May 4: **Voter Registration Deadline
* **Tuesday, May 5: **Early Voting Begins In Person
* **Friday, May 8:** End of Pre-Primary Election Campaign Finance Reporting Period
* **Thursday, May 14:** Traveling Boards Begin
* **Thursday, May 21:** Deadline for a Request for an Absentee By-Mail Ballot to Be Received by the Clerk or Board of Elections and Registration
* **Sunday, May 31: **End of Pre-Primary Supplemental Campaign Finance Large Contribution Reporting Period
* **Monday, June 1: **Deadline for Traveling Boards & Noon Deadline for Early Voting
* **Tuesday, June 2:** Primary Day (noon is the deadline to return absentee ballots)

[\--> Click here for full details on election updates <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0b0d0fbf9c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
When it comes to combating COVID-19, we're all in it together. Please share this information with your family and friends. And for the latest coronavirus updates, please visit [in.gov/coronavirus](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=493eb4fb98&e=1acd9bb3d6).

-Your Indiana Republican Team
---

---
| |
---

name: Raphael
subject: re: Stacey Abrams
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Did you see Stacey's message?
| |
---
Friend,

Did you see that Stacey Abrams just endorsed our campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia? I am proud to call her an ally in our fight to restore moral leadership to Washington - and so grateful to have her support.
**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats CAN flip the Senate - but winning in Georgia is the key. I'm already being outspent by my Republican opponent, who is flooding this race with tens of millions of her own personal fortune ****- ****so I need immediate grassroots support from people like you to fight back.**
[**Please, friend: Will you read Stacey's note below, then chip in $5 or more right now to help us flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats? Every single dollar makes a difference.**](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

Thanks for pitching in. I really appreciate it.

Reverend Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Stacey Abrams
Subject: My endorsement (Georgia Senate announcement)
| |
---
Friends,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia.**But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your early support is so critical.**
In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone.
The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region.
The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality.
That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, just announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor, and an advocate - and he would be the first black senator our state has _ever_ elected. **[_If you are as ready as I am to support Reverend Warnock 's campaign, please give $5 or more right now to become a Founding Donor so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020. _](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit.
For the past fifteen years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know _without a doubt_ that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state.
**But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to _win._ That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. **
**[_So please, friends, will you give $5 now - as much as you can spare - to help Reverend Warnock win this Senate seat, flip Georgia blue and ensure our constitutional rights are protected in the years to come? _](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thank you for your support.

Stacey Abrams
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e6a3/288179be/ae58c77/348ef19c/1449532507/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.
Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only.
PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Trump Signs $2 Trillion Coronavirus Stimulus Bill | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac3f196ca0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump Signs $2 Trillion Coronavirus Stimulus Bill**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c32a945f9&e=3ee4985eea)
-NBC News
“President Donald Trump on Friday signed the $2 trillion coronavirus economic stimulus bill, putting in motion desperately needed financial relief for millions of Americans set back by the pandemic. Trump signed the bill just hours after the House passed it with a bipartisan vote,” Rebecca Shabad reports.
---
|
---
| [**Apple Works with White House to Release 'COVID-19' App, Website**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ed9769d65&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.reuters.com/article/us-health-coronavirus-apple/apple-works-with-white-house-to-release-covid-19-app-website-idUSKBN21E2LP")
_-Reuters_
“Apple Inc and the White House said on Friday that the iPhone maker worked with the Trump administration and federal agencies to release an app and website that will direct users to guidance from the Centers for Disease Control on the disease caused by the coronavirus,” Steve Holland reports. [Learn more about the screening tool here](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dda78b1afa&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| [**Selfless Acts: How Americans are Helping Each Other Through the Coronavirus**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0bd6a29ce9&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Hill_
“People across the United States are taking steps to help one another amid the coronavirus pandemic. From companies donating masks and ventilators to hospitals, to everyday people helping their neighbors, there are countless examples of people trying to do the right thing during an extraordinarily difficult time,” _The Hill_ reports.

🎬 **WATCH:** [No American is alone as long as we are united!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e78d6bd72&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**US Was More Prepared for Pandemic than Any Other Country, Johns Hopkins Study Found**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2e9ddda37&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxnews.com/politics/us-was-most-prepared-country-in-the-world-for-pandemics-johns-hopkins-study-found-in-2019")
-Fox News
“The United States was ranked the best-prepared country in the world to handle a pandemic in late 2019 by the Nuclear Threat Initiative (NTI) and the Johns Hopkins Center for Health Security (JHCHS)—an assessment seemingly at odds with claims by Democrats that the Trump administration left the country vulnerable,” Gregg Re reports.

**MORE:** [“WHO Chief Praises Trump’s Coronavirus ‘Leadership’”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1277b74604&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Gallup Poll: Majority Of Americans Disapprove Of News Media Handling Of Wuhan Coronavirus**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fce0146975&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Federalist_
“Of nine leaders and institutions rated by Americans in a new poll on their response to the novel Wuhan Coronavirus, the media fared the worst, and it’s not even close,” Tristan Justice reports. According to the Gallup poll, only 44 percent of Americans approve of the media’s Coronavirus coverage, while 60 percent approve of President Trump’s response.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec99bedb8e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aba14f80df&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=638099544c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Campaigning from home

body:

The other thing that’s been taking up a lot of my time lately has been raising money. **_[That’s because, right now, we’re still $12,120 away from where we need to be this quarter, which ends in just 3 days. Can you make a donation today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-gA/ni0YAA/t.30g/JJaz9bs6QI-f4dAehlu36g/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJa8oefPWvJ2XK7Kvu3-2B9DYtWRho1DyPj9E4P5ssC5H5bSX0nhKw51Z7zVOeF7irtV-2FVOkBeC-2B9saI3qtROinG56Q2wgevRScLamqDP9lIs2dnB-2FCDq-2BsrvM3c-2B8ob1cXwSPaei-2FGtpUSYn660MplIo1MCl-2BGy3DiDrPmzXn9m7ZL0i6L8iFfzKzPf9HqfAojGbqiTCe-2FEkpD6yAvcIdsgKoa-2BpTn1XHA98SXW8oXkqRQ-3D-3D/hCtg)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-gA/ni0YAA/t.30g/JJaz9bs6QI-f4dAehlu36g/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJa8oefPWvJ2XK7Kvu3-2B9DYtWRho1DyPj9E4P5ssC5H5dTUEc-2F2nozyBSF3AtV69Bi-2B7FdvEhIywE-2BpCYKXETynRxfEzqC5gBGVSaERQ8vrPe0xJKnuNso9tQKBnFs6vzs0ACpz5qvQMrIqZGKxDbhDptVhieOXW9Xl037IMEuHta4KNyHUv7FxouNlz50K-2BkUKz7KDvEqmoXDlCfyViE68d5kaZ4h4XBStm8y-2F70DnbQ-3D-3D/n8ot)
It’s my least favorite part of campaigning, but without the resources we need, our campaign simply can’t get our message out to enough voters. Not being able to campaign in person means that digital ads, mail pieces, and TV commercials are even more important. If we don’t hit our fundraising goal, we have to start cutting some of these essential programs out of our budget. **_[Will you contribute now so that we have the resources we need?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-gA/ni0YAA/t.30g/JJaz9bs6QI-f4dAehlu36g/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJa8oefPWvJ2XK7Kvu3-2B9DYtWRho1DyPj9E4P5ssC5H5dEspqBydjhcshM29jcmcLvFgc28ObZ6bDyUol7gDvc87mPnUPvb4kK8Jm4nerJT35yAlxRXJJpMu3biV6G1rpSVl-2F4-2BB64-2Fc3QGssOmRm28y7BKiBHc1lVgXQkLPXdk8kAYzKWzKtFGPfIXaonRi194uEexc7e08f2Ig7O5eX4OHrqwiqzWusMkQpeu-2BxEHQA-3D-3D/OzF7)_**
Even though I spend most of my time connecting with voters and raising money, I’ve also used more time at home to get back into running and learning how to bake. This past Sunday, at around 10pm, I made red velvet cake for the first time. What do you think? My grandma says she’s proud. Of course, I shared my journey on Instagram.

clean_body: A lot of people have been asking me what it’s like to campaign when we’re all at home social distancing. Even though I can’t knock on doors or meet voters in person, I’m still connecting with people every day | | | Friend, ** A lot of people have been asking me what it’s like to campaign when we’re all at home social distancing. Even though I can’t knock on doors or meet voters in person, I’m still connecting with people every day on the phone, through text, or video. The other thing that’s been taking up a lot of my time lately has been raising money. It’s my least favorite part of campaigning, but without the resources we need, our campaign simply can’t get our message out to enough voters. Not being able to campaign in person means that digital ads, mail pieces, and TV commercials are even more important. If we don’t hit our fundraising goal, we have to start cutting some of these essential programs out of our budget. Even though I spend most of my time connecting with voters and raising money, I’ve also used more time at home to get back into running and learning how to bake. This past Sunday, at around 10pm, I made red velvet cake for the first time. What do you think? My grandma says she’s proud. Of course, I shared my journey on Instagram. name: Team Booker

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We just ran the numbers and here’s the situation we face:
#
We just ran the numbers and here’s the situation we face:
* There are only **3 days** left until our last FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before the primary
* We set a goal to raise **$20,000** and we’re **75%** there

There’s not a lot of time left — but if enough of us step up today and chip in — we can pull this off.
**[If even half of the people reading this email donate $5 we can easily close this gap. Will you chip in today and help our campaign meet our most urgent fundraising goal yet?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16618306/176683336/-561426481?refcode=em20200328&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGVjNGJjNy0yZTcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y4j15qxLdtHgV_OAtxq5NzqlPSwdBLG8-R7gJA_Vkls=)**

Over the past couple of months our campaign has worked tirelessly to build our grassroots strategy, listen to voters about the issues they care about most, and spread Charles’ bold, progressive vision for Kentucky.
Our people-first message is gaining momentum and we know it because Mitch is running like he’s scared.
_But all of the progress we’ve made could easily be taken away if we don’t hit this fundraising goal and that’s the harsh truth._
**We don’t need as much money as Mitch, but we just need enough to power our grassroots plan to reach out to voters and inspire a movement for change. **
[**If you can afford it we hope you can chip in $5 today to help us close the gap and hit our goal by Tuesday. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16618312/176683341/-561426481?refcode=em20200328&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGVjNGJjNy0yZTcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y4j15qxLdtHgV_OAtxq5NzqlPSwdBLG8-R7gJA_Vkls=)
Thanks,
Team Booker
_P.S. Our hearts go out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself — we only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us._

** **

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: How our campaign is adapting:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hey everyone, I'm reaching out today to give you an update on our campaign, and how we're adjusting to our new reality. The coronavirus is an unprecedented global crisis. It's unlike anything we've ever seen in our lifetime, and it's impacting every part of American life. Like every business and organization across the country, we've had to drastically change how we run this campaign. We've canceled all of our in-person events, including our fundraisers, and we're looking for new tools and tactics we can invest in to win a very different kind of campaign than the one we had planned to run. **But our reason for running this campaign has not changed -- not one bit. We have an important FEC fundraising deadline coming up on Tuesday. If you're able, please consider pitching in to help reach our goal:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200328-me?refcode=em-200328-d&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

With all the turmoil of the last few weeks, how we perform at this deadline really matters. I'm taking a good hard look at everything, including our paid media budget, to make sure we're stretching every dollar as far as we can.
The bottom line is this: we have an incredible chance to elect John and flip control of the U.S. Senate right here in this race. Coloradans know John, and they know he's a leader they can trust.
But we know Mitch McConnell is going to do whatever he can to keep his majority. And that includes spending millions of dollars on the air to try to tear us down.
Just this week, his super PAC allies announced they planned to go on the air with a huge multi-million dollar ad buy here in Colorado. I want to make sure we have the resources to respond.
**That's why I'm reaching out to you today to ask you to make a contribution. If it makes sense for you financially right now, please consider pitching in ahead of Tuesday's FEC deadline:**

clean_body: | Hey everyone, I'm reaching out today to give you an update on our campaign, and how we're adjusting to our new reality. The coronavirus is an unprecedented global crisis. It's unlike anything we've ever seen in our lifetime, and it's impacting every part of American life. Like every business and organization across the country, we've had to drastically change how we run this campaign. We've canceled all of our in-person events, including our fundraisers, and we're looking for new tools and tactics we can invest in to win a very different kind of campaign than the one we had planned to run. But our reason for running this campaign has not changed -- not one bit. We have an important FEC fundraising deadline coming up on Tuesday. If you're able, please consider pitching in to help reach our goal: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "=" "=" | "=" "=" | "=" "=" With all the turmoil of the last few weeks, how we perform at this deadline really matters. I'm taking a good hard look at everything, including our paid media budget, to make sure we're stretching every dollar as far as we can. The bottom line is this: we have an incredible chance to elect John and flip control of the U.S. Senate right here in this race. Coloradans know John, and they know he's a leader they can trust. But we know Mitch McConnell is going to do whatever he can to keep his majority. And that includes spending millions of dollars on the air to try to tear us down. Just this week, his super PAC allies announced they planned to go on the air with a huge multi-million dollar ad buy here in Colorado. I want to make sure we have the resources to respond. That's why I'm reaching out to you today to ask you to make a contribution. If it makes sense for you financially right now, please consider pitching in ahead of Tuesday's FEC deadline: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "=" "=" | "=" "=" | "=" "=" Thank you for all you do. Please stay safe and stay healthy. -- M.E. M.E. Smith Campaign Manager, Hickenlooper for Colorado Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 ""

subject: Grit, determination, and grassroots support

body:
Raising online donations from real, everyday people — not big corporations or special interests — has been front and center in Josh’s campaign since day one.
Right now, those donations are more important than ever, friends .
We know things are difficult and confusing — there’s been a massive disruption to our daily lives. If you’re unable to chip in, we understand.
But if you’re able to chip in $5 or $10 right now, you will help us get one step closer to defeating Andy Barr in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200328_em_fr_eoq2_l1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200328_em_fr_eoq2&amount=5&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500]
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200328_em_fr_eoq2_abx&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200328_em_fr_eoq2_abx&amount=25&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500]
Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200328_em_fr_eoq2_other&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500]
Over the last two weeks, we’ve completely shifted to a virtual campaign. We’re making sure to stay safe and follow the leadership set by Governor Beshear.
But we’re also working harder than ever.
Even though things seem like they’re changing constantly, there’s still one constant for every campaign: The end of quarter fundraising deadline.
It’s our first chance of 2020 to really show what our campaign is made of — grit, determination, and grassroots support.
We’re still on track for our biggest quarter to date, but we can only get there with your support. Can you chip in before our end of quarter deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200328_em_fr_eoq2_l2&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500]
Thanks for your support,
Team Hicks

Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200328_em_fr_eoq2_ftr2&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500]

Peter,

I will be the AOC of the GOP.

Congress needs a leader who isn’t afraid to challenge Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s **RADICAL** agenda especially when Democrat’s like Donna Shalala refuse to.

Ocasio-Cortez’s inexperience is only exceeded by her complete ignorance of the history and tragedy of socialism. It’s obvious she has never spent a moment talking to any of the **1,000,000+ Cuban exiles in this country** and getting their thoughts on socialism!

**I’ve stood up to Fidel Castro. I spent three years reporting from a Central American warzone in El Salvador. I’ve been exposing corrupt authoritarian and socialist regimes my entire career. I think I can handle a socialist wannabee from the Bronx! **

If I’m going to push back on the rising tide of socialism in this country, I’m going to need your help, Peter. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, my first END OF QUARTER deadline of 2020 is March 31st! name: Margaret Good
subject: Resources to Help Our Community Respond to COVID-19
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16621259/176716925/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGFhYmJmZC0zYjcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Kq4ye48htOr89XRJXGYcw9EXngMav5x1-hscydDz2Y=&emci=234cb451-3571-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=74aabbfd-3b71-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) Dear team, Over the course of the last two weeks COVID-19 has had a dramatic impact on Florida and our community. We are concerned about the virus spread and what it will mean for our health and for the economic health of our community--all of our lives have changed significantly. Many people are seeking help to keep their businesses and families afloat. However, given the dynamic nature of this virus and Florida’s response to it, it can be hard to comb through the articles, websites, and executive orders to understand what’s available. To help members of our community find the resources available to them, I have [**launched a website**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16621260/176716926/-241073385?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGFhYmJmZC0zYjcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Kq4ye48htOr89XRJXGYcw9EXngMav5x1-hscydDz2Y=&emci=234cb451-3571-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=74aabbfd-3b71-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) that provides information about the virus and resources for people experiencing hardship. If you have questions that this website does not address or if you need help navigating any of these organizations or agencies to get the help you need, please do not hesitate to contact me. I wish you, your family, and our community health. I look forward to working with you all to help our community thrive again. Together, we will get through this. Margaret

---

clean_body: | Hey folks — We know how difficult this time is for so many Minnesotans and folks across the country. So before we go any further, thank you for continuing to engage with our campaign. Your support means the world to Tina and the rest of our team. Now, can we be frank with you for a moment? Our very first FEC filing deadline of this critical election year is in just a few days. That’s why, in just a second, we’ll ask you to donate to our campaign, but only if you can afford to do so — we mean that. The truth is, we have what it takes to win our race and keep this Senate seat working for the people of our state, but it’ll require building a campaign that can overcome anything thrown at us in the months ahead. That’s why we’re turning to you today: Can Tina and the rest of our team count on you to add a donation of $10 or more before our first FEC fundraising deadline of this critical election year? Please, only contribute if you are financially able to do so. Thank you in advance for anything you can chip in. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This bears repeating: Only pitch in if you can afford to do so. Tina knows how difficult and unprecedented this moment is for you and your families. The most important thing you can do during this crisis is to take care of yourself and your loved ones. Whether you chip in today or not, we’re thankful to have your support. We’ll get through this together. Stay safe. — Save Minnesota’s Senate Seat P.S. We know these emails can be a bit overwhelming, especially during this unprecedented moment. To receive fewer emails during this public health emergency, Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Francis Conole
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
It's never been more clear that we deserve representation that will listen to real people -- not special interests and the rich and powerful.

|
---
[ ](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4a2/388db0e9/8de33c7/609bb092/764260411/VEsH/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conoleforcongress.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1")

| | Friends We are just a few days away from the first end-of-quarter deadline of 2020. Now, I know that with all that's happening right now, our FEC deadline is probably not at the top of your list of things to pay attention to. That's why I want to give you an explanation of why it's so important we raise $10,000 before March 31st. New York's 24th Congressional District is one of our best chances to expand our House majority -- it's one of only three districts still held by a Republican despite Hillary Clinton winning here in 2016. The only way we'll be able to work toward a progressive agenda in Congress is to win districts like this. **[So please, will you make a donation towards our $10,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal? Any amount would be a huge help.](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_mar?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+So+please+will+you+make+a+donation+towar&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1")** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4a2/388db0e9/8de33c7/609bb090/764260411/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9tYXIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDMyOF9FT1ExcmVzZW5kX1UyX1gxIn0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_mar?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+gtgt&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1")

Our Republican opponent, Congressman John Katko, has failed central New York for far too long. It's never been more clear that we deserve representation that will listen to real people -- not special interests and the rich and powerful.
**I will be the Congressman our district deserves. I promise I will not let you down.**
[**If you can, dig deep, and make a donation to our campaign today. Reaching our $10,000 end-of-quarter goal will show Katko and the GOP that we are prepared to flip this seat.**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_mar?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+If+you+can+dig+deep+and+make+a+donation+&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200328_EOQ1resend_U2_X1")
Thanks,
Francis

name: MJ Hegar Senior Staff
subject: MJ asked us to reach out to this grassroots team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We'll be blunt. This campaign will only defeat entrenched politician Senator John Cornyn if we can build one of the biggest grassroots teams in Texas history.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1dddd/326336023/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1dddc/326336023/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?refcode=email_20200328.2nd__1127__&amount=3&recurring=true")
---

Hey team,

We'll be blunt. Right now we're relying heavily on our online grassroots team since all in-person events have been suspended. **_That 's why MJ asked us to reach out to you personally about her Grassroots Dollar Drive!_

[Will you pitch in just $3 to be a part of the movement that will DEFEAT Senator Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1dddc/326336023/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?refcode=email_20200328.2nd__1127__&amount=3&recurring=true")

$3 can make a significant impact! Your grassroots donation will be bundled with _thousands_ of others from across Texas and the nation. They'll all add up to make a HUGE difference in this race!**
**[**DONATE $3 NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1dddc/326336023/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?refcode=email_20200328.2nd__1127__&amount=3&recurring=true")**
After nearly two decades of selling Texans out to the highest bidder, Senator John Cornyn has a $12 million war chest built with the help of corporate PACs -- and more special interest money will be flooding Texas soon.

**We can 't do this without you. Will you contribute $3 (or whatever you can) today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $3>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1ddd3/326336023/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200328.2nd__1127__&amount=3")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1ddd2/326336023/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200328.2nd__1127__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1ddd1/326336023/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200328.2nd__1127__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1ddd0/326336023/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200328.2nd__1127__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1ddd7/326336023/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?refcode=email_20200328.2nd__1127__")**
Thanks,
MJ Hegar Senior Staff

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1ddd6/326336023/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?refcode=email_20200328.2nd__1127__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1ddd5/326336023/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1127&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c0/7f51f7bc/4cc6c85a/4ef1ddd4/326336023/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

"" After nearly two decades of selling Texans out to the highest bidder, Senator John Cornyn has a $12 million war chest built with the help of corporate PACs -- and more special interest money will be flooding Texas soon. We can 't do this without you. Will you contribute $3 (or whatever you can) today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, MJ Hegar Senior Staff "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

subject: We need to adapt... quickly.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16621932/176724008/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjcxNTk1Mi00MDcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AYcJ2uOavgAV7IvRjofuE0v9bd8OiqwmrkbwhgmKi9w=&emci=16cebc0e-3971-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ff715952-4071-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)
Friends \--

We hope you are not among those who have suddenly found themselves facing unexpected difficult times. If you are... _this email is not for you._

This email is only for those fortunate enough to have a steady income during these tough times. These are not easy words to write at this moment, but the truth is we need your support -- now more than ever.

As you can imagine, we have radically shifted how we are operating our campaign for Congress. _Most notably, we have cancelled in-person fundraisers._ That has required us to rethink how to raise the funds we need to continue to fight for the progressive, humanitarian values we believe in.

**So much has changed, but the amount required to make a successful bid for Congress has not. And right now, running a competitive, well-funded campaign means raising another $45,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline hits on Tuesday.**

So we have to ask: **[If you are able, can you please contribute $3 or more to Georgette’s campaign today? Not only will you help us meet our FEC fundraising goal, you’ll help us send a powerful message that we’re still as committed as ever to our shared progressive values.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16621933/176724009/1136511447?refcode=em-200328-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjcxNTk1Mi00MDcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AYcJ2uOavgAV7IvRjofuE0v9bd8OiqwmrkbwhgmKi9w=)**

We can’t do this without you, friend. Thank you.

_Team Gómez_ **[DONATE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q1-2020?refcode=em-200328-all-a)**

---
Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
---
Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. _**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16621934/176724010/1136511447?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjcxNTk1Mi00MDcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AYcJ2uOavgAV7IvRjofuE0v9bd8OiqwmrkbwhgmKi9w=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/16cebc0e-3971-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8/ff715952-4071-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjcxNTk1Mi00MDcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AYcJ2uOavgAV7IvRjofuE0v9bd8OiqwmrkbwhgmKi9w=&id=110960909&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: We will win this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Coronavirus continues to have a major impact on our daily lives. Our children remain home from school, many are forced to work from home, others have been furloughed and small business owners are confronting unprecedented challenges.

But as Houstonians know, we have been through tough times before and just like then, together we will overcome this. The people of Houston are no stranger to lending a helping hand to a neighbor in need. Our resilience, our compassion and our spirit make me proud to call myself a Houstonian.

As this health challenge continues, we must do everything in our power to stop the spread of Coronavirus. Even if you think you are not at risk, maintaining social distance and following the hygiene guidelines provided by our medical professionals could save the life of someone you love.

If you have the ability to contribute to those in need or support one of our incredible local businesses, please do so. Our restaurants are working very hard to remain open and keep communities across Houston fed.

Finally, I would like to extend my gratitude to the fearless healthcare workers on the front lines of this health challenge, to the hardworking Houstonians putting in overtime at grocery stores throughout the area, and to truck drivers across the nation for keeping our supply chain strong.

I am confident that we will make it through this stronger and more unified than ever. Our collective resolve as a community is unbreakable. We will win this fight.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0ba489ffd5534484b3f11a3e164c7203&_e=sVe7YRi_M5ejJ3y-1dOW-Xex7kXNXY4YIheUPPyVAwDyZyB3uTZBCmNxX7Rsbqnhgq1HGg3xHo_Bd0RdM6wEOGm2phmQ0cZLzB-CKKayiBTTM9tGE3C__N08t7ZKCEbY37XnPkrPsN4ITbwtMOTtUwrD42uCum1JM-7w40CCY_4IkOJGG2SnsTzrD7G3VPfaCAajd0Hh0sbTATkIzRdwKMl71T-2DLyIpiXZ4yQQUiwrO3fQykTYtHDKh1-HS_DE4baEb1cCxEQFBeZ0SZwui-oBYQB3AHj78-MbzLrIW5I%3D)****

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: From coronavirus to Medicare for All: a path forward.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e541/6cd27893/5391c515/159055ee/3747139511/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | With our nation and planet gripped by a growing pandemic, it's clearer than ever what our priority has to be when we get past this crisis. Right now we must work together as a society to minimize the damage done and loss of life due to the COVID-19 Coronavirus _immediately_. And then? **We must fix America's broken health care system.** What our movement already knew has been utterly exposed by this pandemic: our system is **fundamentally broken.** **Health care tied to employment at a time when people can't go to work. People unable to seek medical care due to fear of costs. People not having insurance at all.****_All_****of these things are problematic at best and downright dangerous at worst.** The way forward is clear. The Affordable Care Act has been a critical improvement, but it's time to take the next steps and ensure the health and welfare of the American people for generations to come. In the midst of this pandemic, we must ensure that our medical first responders have the protective equipment they need; that COVID-19 tests are available for all those who need them; and that our hospitals have the ventilators, beds, and funding they need. And when this pandemic subsides--and we will defeat it--we must renew our commitment to health care for all. Every American must have the opportunity to participate in simple, seamless, cost-effective **Medicare for All**. And we must end the gouging of Americans on drug prices by banning drug companies from charging more for a drug than they charge in Canada, Europe, and Japan. Onward. _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e541/6cd27893/5391c515/159055ef/3747139511/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-03-28-health&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e541/6cd27893/5391c515/159055ec/3747139511/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-03-28-health&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e541/6cd27893/5391c515/159055ed/3747139511/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-03-28-health&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e541/6cd27893/5391c515/159055ea/3747139511/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-03-28-health&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Breaking News (via ChristyForCongress.org)
subject: NEW Republican ad buy >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

**The NRCC just booked $687,954 of TV ads to help Mike Garcia flip this seat.
[Don't let them win -- pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help hit our end-of-quarter goal.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ed/29776869/a1fd870/569fb806/1418538870/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjhfZW9xUlItczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200328_eoqRR-s3")**

Peter,

Mike Garcia's allies are rushing to his rescue.

The National Republican Congressional Committee just reserved over $687,000 worth of TV ads between March 31st all the way to May 11th. That's **six straight weeks** of nonstop ads attacking Christy and defending Mike Garcia.

**And right now, we simply don't have the resources to push back.**

**[I know this is a tough time, but I wouldn't ask if it weren't important -- we need to raise our end-of-quarter goal to $50,000 so we can compete. Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ed/29776869/a1fd870/569fb806/1418538870/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjhfZW9xUlItczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200328_eoqRR-s3")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ed/29776869/a1fd870/569fb807/1418538870/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjhfZW9xUlItczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200328_eoqRR-s3&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ed/29776869/a1fd870/569fb800/1418538870/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjhfZW9xUlItczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200328_eoqRR-s3&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ed/29776869/a1fd870/569fb801/1418538870/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjhfZW9xUlItczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200328_eoqRR-s3&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ed/29776869/a1fd870/569fb802/1418538870/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjhfZW9xUlItczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200328_eoqRR-s3&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ed/29776869/a1fd870/569fb803/1418538870/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjhfZW9xUlItczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200328_eoqRR-s3&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ed/29776869/a1fd870/569fb806/1418538870/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjhfZW9xUlItczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200328_eoqRR-s3")
This is the last special election before November. And it's the biggest one that will take place in the context of the coronavirus crisis.

**Whether we like it or not, the national message out of our race will be about who Americans trust to lead us through this crisis and the fallout.**

Will they pick a Trump clone who's spending his free time tweeting childish attacks at Christy from a shadow account?

Or will they pick a proven leader who's been working tirelessly to pass relief for California families, small businesses, and health care workers?

**I know who I trust. But right now Republicans' big buy could tip the balance in this race as they flood the airwaves with their national special interest money.**

**[Can you help push back and make sure we get Christy's message to voters across the district? Pitch in to help hit our new $50,000 end-of-quarter goal.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ed/29776869/a1fd870/569fb806/1418538870/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjhfZW9xUlItczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200328_eoqRR-s3")**

I know times are tough. I appreciate how much this team has had Christy's back,

\-- Brandon

clean_body: | []() | | The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win. The NRCC just booked $687,954 of TV ads to help Mike Garcia flip this seat. "" Peter, Mike Garcia's allies are rushing to his rescue. The National Republican Congressional Committee just reserved over $687,000 worth of TV ads between March 31st all the way to May 11th. That's six straight weeks of nonstop ads attacking Christy and defending Mike Garcia. And right now, we simply don't have the resources to push back. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" "" | "" This is the last special election before November. And it's the biggest one that will take place in the context of the coronavirus crisis. Whether we like it or not, the national message out of our race will be about who Americans trust to lead us through this crisis and the fallout. Will they pick a Trump clone who's spending his free time tweeting childish attacks at Christy from a shadow account? Or will they pick a proven leader who's been working tirelessly to pass relief for California families, small businesses, and health care workers? I know who I trust. But right now Republicans' big buy could tip the balance in this race as they flood the airwaves with their national special interest money. "" I know times are tough. I appreciate how much this team has had Christy's back, \-- Brandon Brandon Zavala Campaign Manager "" | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Marshall's Secret Sanctuary Funding
body:
Opens $850M to Sanctuary Cities | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/marshalls-secret-sanctuary-funding?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| **> >> BREAKING NEWS <<<**
Dear Friend,

Congressman Roger Marshall, who has mocked President Trump’s effort to build the wall on our southern border, just voted to circumvent President Trump’s prohibition on federal law enforcement grant funding for sanctuary cities. **Marshall's vote allows sanctuary cities unfettered access to a new $850 million fund.**

The sanctuary city provision was quietly tucked into the recent stimulus bill **along with another provision giving Congress a new $25 funding enhancement.** Yet Congressman Roger Marshall was silent. The overall bill is important, but should not have been used for Marshall's open borders agenda or new funds for an already bloated Congress.

To meet the challenges left in the wake of the virus, we need strong leaders who will meet these challenges with integrity - not slight of hand. **I need your help to clean up our nation's capitol. **

Your contribution today of $25, $50, $100 or $250 will help us meet our March 31st goal. ** Truly, any amount makes a difference **and sends a message that Kansans have had enough of the Washington games.

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=59b9a58011&e=41f8e27552 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Be sure to also sign up to join the team. Check out my priorities page and share our message with your friends and family.

---

Dear Friend, Today, I am spending my Saturday calling every single supporter possible to ask you to chip in as much as you can before our end of quarter deadline on Tuesday night at 8:59 PM. My 7 year old daughter is here with me, coloring and playing with her dolls while I am on the phone. Having her by my side keeps me focused on what really matters: her future. We've got one more shot at making sure we put an end to the climate and health crises that threaten our people, water, land, air and planet. I'm here at HQ giving it everything I've got. The end of the quarter is 3 days away, and we have a plan to reach thousands of voters here in SW Oregon with phone calls, texting, social media, and more. But I can't get out the word out to voters without your support. **[Make a contribution now to help us reach our goal of $15,000 before our end-of-quarter FEC filing deadline on March 31st. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1AA/ni0YAA/t.30g/x5b06Z9yQGGhMfgl39Ureg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v05-2Fi7D9J-2Fqhj-2F46hEBctJ7P-2FqeWsVA6iVYTz9NXF04yBMZQPVgEN-2Fkj3wTlX4eMmou7Ay8BJNVw7-2BMaYkAYqmnaKOqe1gB-2Fq4dwcVuzPuvNuNXQ4yOkeMRaFW6-2BaYY77VGDfdslVillqahBnjqFsVH1eDniT45Pw-2FXxSemLF-2BJjKutjJCDsCJgwZ-2FtMPpnF6L3g9jeBFF5xHuFxfuy0r0cR-2BGeggPkeYOjeSOmfcNRfaRjkzKyZuL0za-2BJV7-2BbbEK/2uhi)**
