clean_body: My 7 year old daughter is here with me, coloring and playing with her dolls while I am on the phone. Having her by my side keeps me focused on what really matters: her future. We've got one more shot at making sure we put an end to the pollution that thre | | Dear Friend, Today, I am spending my Saturday calling every single supporter possible to ask you to chip in as much as you can before our end of quarter deadline on Tuesday night at 8:59 PM. My 7 year old daughter is here with me, coloring and playing with her dolls while I am on the phone. Having her by my side keeps me focused on what really matters: her future. We've got one more shot at making sure we put an end to the climate and health crises that threaten our people, water, land, air and planet. I'm here at HQ giving it everything I've got. The end of the quarter is 3 days away, and we have a plan to reach thousands of voters here in SW Oregon with phone calls, texting, social media, and more. But I can't get out the word out to voters without your support. No-one could have anticipated the unique challenges of running a grassroots campaign during a global pandemic, but we are adaptable and here to organize and win. With your help, we can make the calls, send the text messages, and mail important election information to voters across the district in April. Thank you for your support, Doyle Canning | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via . name: Mike Franken
subject: The Admiral Challenges You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
In the time of COVID-19, raising money to run a political campaign requires inventiveness and additional sacrifice. So here's the deal: To defeat Senator Joni Ernst, my wife and I will match online do
|
---
| |
---

| | Dear friends: In the time of COVID-19, raising money to run a political campaign requires inventiveness and additional sacrifice. **So here 's the deal: To defeat Senator Joni Ernst, my wife and I will match online donations -- dollar for dollar -- to the end of the month.** My savings comes from being a 36-year naval officer. I am parting with it to ensure Iowans know why I am the candidate to beat Joni Ernst. | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f248c/33365068/4a6aa197/3f8becb7/3534626648/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200328_eom1_em_fr_all_b1")
---
Why? Because Iowans are worth it. Because America is worth it. And because I am confident that with your support, we will win the primary and the general election.
**Putting my savings behind this campaign is a way to continue to give back to what I believe in -- a better future for our children and succeeding generations._[Click here, and I will pile on.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f248c/33365068/4a6aa197/3f8becb0/3534626648/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200328_eom1_em_fr_all_l1")_ Thank you!**
[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f248c/33365068/4a6aa197/3f8becb1/3534626648/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200328_eom1_em_fr_all_b2")

Very respectfully,
Admiral Mike

name: Team Tina
subject: Will you sign this card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — During this public health emergency, we have seen so many individuals step up and provide critical services for our communities. Childcare providers are among this heroic and important group. Childcare providers are keeping their doors open during this difficult time to ensure our frontline workers can continue to treat the ill, supply our food, and receive necessary services. Without childcare services, many of these workers would not be able to perform their jobs. **[That’s why we’re asking you to step up today and thank our childcare providers by adding your name to our card right here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16625883/176777219/1781791769?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjk5YjllMS01OTcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zpcVLD7K-2Tonk-hV8gfvaa3cxIHMLcg4Q5BEg6Hk1g=&emci=c999b9e1-5971-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=cf99b9e1-5971-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)** | [Sign the card](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16625884/176777220/1781791769?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjk5YjllMS01OTcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zpcVLD7K-2Tonk-hV8gfvaa3cxIHMLcg4Q5BEg6Hk1g=&emci=c999b9e1-5971-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=cf99b9e1-5971-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)

Stay safe and healthy.

subject: Help us finish strong! 💪
body:
We have 3 days to hit our monthly and quarterly goals | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/45d46d43c1fc/help-us-finish-strong?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I have an urgent update I need to share with you.

We are coming up on an important fundraising deadline, and our team has set a goal for the next 3 days:**raise $15,000 to show everybody what a grassroots movement can do and fund our new digital organizing strategy. **

_If we hit this goal, we can fund our new digital organizing needs that are a necessity in this time of social distancing._

We only have 3 days before the end of the first quarter of 2020, and I want to make sure we finish strong. Your support means the world to me, and [I humbly ask for you to chip in again](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=076f1a749c&e=140a9b81e7) to help us hit our goal and fill up that thermometer at the end of this email.

Thank you, and stay safe.

Dani Brzozowski

name: Hegar, MJ
subject: In-person events are suspended
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c2/7f51f7bc/4cdbf219/4ef1de3f/1349281375/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter, I want to tell you why **[I'm asking you for $3 today](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c2/7f51f7bc/4cdbf219/4ef1de3e/1349281375/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?refcode=email_20200328.3nd__1135__&amount=3&recurring=true")**.

Right now we're relying heavily on our online grassroots team since all in-person events have been suspended.

We're building a different kind of campaign here -- one that relies on the many, not the money. But "the many" means that **I need every single person reading this to throw in what you can --[even if it's just $3](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c2/7f51f7bc/4cdbf219/4ef1de3e/1349281375/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?refcode=email_20200328.3nd__1135__&amount=3&recurring=true")**. Your contribution will support our ever-growing operation and pay for ads to spread our message.

**Tomorrow my team will let me know how many people were able to give $3 to keep this campaign moving forward**. I'm hoping to see a number that reflects the real enthusiasm I know this team has to win this race. Peter -- I'm asking for your support.

**Can you pitch in $3 or more toward our Grassroots Dollar Drive? Your support will make a difference.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $3>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c2/7f51f7bc/4cdbf219/4ef1de3d/1349281375/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nd-march-donor-drive?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200328.3nd__1135__&amount=3")**

MJ

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c2/7f51f7bc/4cdbf219/4ef1de37/1349281375/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1135&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: CoryBooker.com
subject: No one should be forced to leave a sick family member to go to work.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Looking for as many folks as possible to join this petition. |
#
Friend, It's this simple: no one should be forced to go to work sick, no one should be forced to leave a sick family member to go to work, no one should be forced to choose between taking care of themselves or their loved ones or collecting a paycheck. **Cory has been working hard throughout this public health crisis, advocating for funding and support for essential workers and those on the front lines of fighting the COVID-19 virus.** [**Will you add your name to our urgent petition demanding Congress expand paid family and sick leave through the rest of this crisis and beyond? If you support paid leave as a worker 's right, we need you to join us on this one.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-the-petition-paid-family-leave-march-2020?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+add+your+name+to+our+urgent+pet&utm_campaign=em200328&source=em200328") | [ADD MY NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-the-petition-paid-family-leave-march-2020?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+ADD+MY+NAME&utm_campaign=em200328&source=em200328")
---
Cory has always been a champion for workers and workers' rights, and this crisis has only underscored the importance of the fight for labor protections.
He immediately sprung into action early in this coronavirus crisis, advocating for widening the social safety net by expanding unemployment insurance, calling for emergency funding to support child care and elder care costs for workers on the front lines, and urging major companies like Amazon to provide safer working conditions for their employees.
**Cory will keep advocating for more resources and support for as long as this crisis continues -- and beyond.**
[**If you agree that paid sick and family leave is a fundamental right, please add your name to our petition. It 's important that we build as much public support as possible, so we'd really appreciate it if you signed your name today.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-the-petition-paid-family-leave-march-2020?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+If+you+agree+that+paid+sick+and+family+l&utm_campaign=em200328&source=em200328")
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-the-petition-paid-family-leave-march-2020?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+THE+PETITION&utm_campaign=em200328&source=em200328")
---
Thanks for standing up for workers.
CoryBooker.com

**Here are important resources to refer to during this public health emergency:
[www.cdc.gov/coronavirus](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f85/5fca0d19/7a48322d/291d1827/2186644982/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=5+-+wwwcdcgovcoronavirus&utm_campaign=em200328&source=em200328")

[www.jobs.covid19.nj.gov](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f85/5fca0d19/7a48322d/291d1825/2186644982/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.jobs.covid19.nj.gov?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=7+-+wwwjobscovid19njgov&utm_campaign=em200328&source=em200328")**

If you'd like to receive fewer emails during this public health crisis, [**please click here**. ](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f85/5fca0d19/7a48322d/291d1824/2186644982/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=8+-+please+click+here+&utm_campaign=em200328&source=em200328")

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: The GOP is looking for weaknesses in our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Can I explain something, folks? I'm about to ask you to add a donation to my campaign before our first end-of-quarter filing deadline during this all-important election year. But first, I wanted to say a quick thanks for supporting my team and our work. I know these are not normal times and it would be wrong to pretend that they are, but just knowing you opened this email makes me so grateful to have you on the team. Thank you for everything. I promise to never stop fighting for you and your family. Now, about why I'm emailing today... Every quarter, candidates for federal office must file financial reports with the Federal Election Commission. It's a way of keeping politicians honest about who's donating how much to their campaigns. **It 's also a big test of campaigns' strength. ** You see, the numbers we report on Tuesday will become public. Which means everyone from the TV pundits to news outlets to Washington Republicans and even our opponent will see the numbers we report. The GOP is looking for any sign of weakness in our campaign, and we absolutely cannot give it to them. If we report low numbers, they'll think Colorado is ripe for the taking and send more attacks our way. **Our end-of-quarter deadline in three days is the biggest goal our campaign has faced so far. That 's why I'm personally asking you to add a contribution of $10 or more to our campaign before Tuesday, if you can afford it.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200328-public?refcode=em-200328-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200328-public?refcode=em-200328-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Every dollar matters to me personally, and I'm so grateful to have you on the team. I know times are tough right now, but we'll get through this together.
Thanks for all you do,
John
P.S. We know this is a difficult time, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones and only pitch in if you can afford to do so. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Indiana needs YOU to do your part!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
To defeat the coronavirus and protect our fellow Hoosiers, Indiana needs YOU to keep doing your part. Because, as Governor Holcomb said yesterday – we | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

To defeat the coronavirus and protect our fellow Hoosiers, Indiana needs YOU to keep doing your part. Because, as Governor Holcomb said yesterday – we’re stronger together:

_“We’re living in the real world here and it requires us to make some big changes. So, I want to**thank every Hoosier out there that wants to be part of the many, not part of the few.** We are going to get through this together and we’re going to be stronger together for it.”_

And while you’re doing your part to hunker down, Governor Holcomb and his team are continuing to show decisive leadership. Here are some of the latest actions he announced –

**Indiana State Department of Health:**
* By the end of the week, our nurse surveyors will have been to all 535 nursing homes and all 232 free-standing facilities in the state of Indiana, helping them prepare by sharing guidance and reviewing their plan for COVID-19 action.
* We are working to extend COVID-19 testing in Indiana and hope to have additional in-state labs on board in the coming weeks.
* We’ve enhanced our data dashboard at [coronavirus.in.gov](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=42312fd482e74906b60a1b1ff183f10f&_e=THstvSX4y3pd9xHLvhwBOHG-a5cCrbM37F8BXkhNnboRyhVIUMRjJcNF3boCuEWwDd_DPCZd6aDEiFfguR7H8FKLy5UvdWXrjVNc5cCJ6y_tNnxH0WHT8VGla498NQcKJnlbbDkU7l9nlzqkWQ6YUKqmk-mzSUrRHQLwO-7CRUtZGgikwz-qVuXFPVWLFEuidcB8CNxAvsyGYyVhDFQNtO7xX2PLE_LtaWhUaRlqsf6b_YG-Lr9u6ntOZILpzHUtQN-PWAb-6L1L9aAgJl__K_xoDWmGn5GpUs2l1zGsj0ewjSIERs1PKUxQHe5TZ1RF3mztThHpp22e16ryQBlEcWUpyd79tVeQnyTNabPlQk0-Z5T5cairf0ArBfCGkK1-7bcuGBQ92_R8JV32u8DvAQ%3D%3D). We’ll continue to update that daily.

**Indiana Department of Transportation:**
* We are seeing fewer Hoosiers going out – just yesterday, traffic on Indiana roads was down 41% compared to the last year.
* INDOT is maintaining Indiana’s highways for essential travel as we respond to the COVID-19 emergency.
* Our freight network plays a vital need in getting food and supplies to Hoosiers and we’re keeping our supply lines intact.
* INDOT employees are working hard alongside the Indiana National Guard, Indiana State Police and Indiana Department of Health to transport needed supplies to hospitals and healthcare facilities throughout the state.
* Our 2020 construction program is moving forward and on schedule. We’re building over 1,000 projects throughout the state.

**Indiana Department of Correction:**
* No DOC inmates have tested positive for COVID-19.
* Our correctional facilities have the ability to manufacture a number of needed products, and DOC inmates are in the process of starting to produce gowns, face masks, hand sanitizer, and other medical protective items. They’ll be able to produce 200 gowns and 200 masks a day.

**And, as always, Governor Holcomb is grateful for all the Hoosiers who are stepping up, helping out and doing their part to get us through this crisis.**

He mentioned his American Legion post developing a buddy check system so our older veterans are being cared for and getting what they need. Distilleries continue to make hand sanitizer; mayors are stepping up in their communities to provide for displaced workers and our pastors are helping to lessen the emotional strain Hoosiers are under during this time.
**“We need you! We need the public en masse to do their part... this is too important. We can’t get this wrong.”**

Governor Holcomb is an eternal optimist, but he’s also a realist. He knows we’re still in the middle of this and we’ll see more confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the days ahead. This is urban, this is suburban, and this is rural.

So, **THANK YOU** to every single one of you who is who is doing your part to get us through this. We’re going to get through this, **together**.

Thanks,
Your Holcomb Crew

---
---
|
|
| |
---
| Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. |
| Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 |

|
